Marketing support

Partner Call-Out Days.

Structured, high-energy days of outbound activity run at your office. The Purple team joins your sales reps on the floor, working through your existing pipeline together to identify the best-fit accounts and get conversations started.

The expertsLive coaching and Q&A from the Purple team, working the floor alongside your reps.
The hypeOn-floor energy and motivation that keeps momentum going all day.
The lootVouchers, sweets, and prizes for hitting milestones and winning friendly competitions.
The resultsA post-event performance report showing what the day achieved.
Book a Call-Out Day
For registered partners only. Not yet a partner? Apply here.

Request received

Your partner manager will follow up to confirm details and lock in a date.

On the day

Built-in incentives to keep the energy up.

"The Firsts": instant vouchers
The Icebreaker - first conversation lasting longer than 5 minutes.
The Suite Success - first hospitality meeting booked.
The Rebound - first person to turn a "no" into a meeting.
Mini-games & motivation
Objection Bingo - reps cross off common pushbacks like "We already have WiFi."
Pass the Parcel - a "hot potato" voucher stays on a desk until stolen by the next booked meeting.
Golden Envelope - mystery prizes for hitting milestones.
Battle cards & objection handling
Vertical-specific hooks (Retail: closing the offline gap. Hospitality: owning the relationship) plus ready responses to common objections like "We already have WiFi" and "IT handles that."

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.

Partners
Purple Partners, the channel program for resellers, MSPs, and systems integrators selling identity-based WiFi solutions.
